message:
test(serve): batch 31 — WSEventStore, AuditStore, OpenAPI, Pipeline, RBAC branch tests (81.1→81.6%)

12 new tests:
- WSEventStore: Store persist error, RecordDropped DB error, getFromDB topic filter + limit, cursor-too-old branch
- AuditStore: cleanup with old records (→100%), cleanup DB error, Close with errors (→92.3%), NewAuditStore DB open error
- OpenAPI: handleOpenAPISpec TLS, handleSwaggerUI TLS (→100%)
- Pipeline: handleListPipelines with FinishedAt (58.3→91.7%)
- RBAC: roleHierarchy unknown role (→100%), writeApprovalRequired full response

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
